title: Networked A-Frame: Framework Sync
objective: Survive a 3-minute sync run by catching falling A-Frame modules that match the current network rule, building combo multiplier through clean catches while avoiding desynced decoys that damage your framework integrity.

controls.input: Drag left or right anywhere on the lower half of the screen
controls.outcome: The framework cradle slides horizontally under falling objects with one-thumb control.
The cradle snaps a short distance for last-second catches or dodges.

controls.input: Hold briefly after catching 5 valid items in a row
controls.outcome: Consumes the combo pulse to widen the cradle for 2 seconds and protect the multiplier.

steps: A-Frame modules, ghost frames, and linked pairs fall from the top in three loose lanes.
Catch valid modules in the cradle to score; each clean catch adds to combo.
Avoid ghost frames and invalid modules; each mistake removes 1 integrity.
Every 8 seconds the network rule flips with an audio cue: Solo Sync means only single A-Frames score, Pair Sync means only linked frame-pair
scoring: Each valid catch is worth 10 points times the current combo multiplier. Multiplier rises by +1 every 4 clean catches up to x5. Catching the wrong object breaks combo and costs integrity. During Pair Sync, catching both
tips: Stay near center before each sync flip so either lane is reachable with one thumb.
Use edge taps only for emergencies; long drags are safer for maintaining combo.
Listen for the mode-change sound: a dry click means Solo Sync, a rising chime means Pair Sync.
Spend the stabilize pulse when drop speed increases, not early.

trendContext.title: networked-aframe A web framework for building multi-user virtual reality experiences.
